name: Baked Salmon Packets
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Place four large pieces of foil on a working surface, shiny side down.
3. Spray the inside of the foil with vegetable cooking spray.
4. Place one salmon filet in the center of each piece of foil.
5. Evenly divide the thyme, parsley, garlic, salt, pepper, and white wine among the fish fillets.
6. Dot each filet with one teaspoon of butter.
7. Securely fold and seal the edges of the foil to create packets.
8. Place the packets on a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes.
9. Remove the packets from the oven and place them on plates.
10. Carefully open the packets over a plate.
